entry.text:
We are strictly volunteer, ALL money earned through donations go right back into the community servers, for better equipment, server managers, bots, ext..
If you like what we do, enjoy our Servers and would like to help us Keep the lights on consider subscribing and joining our Donor ranks We have a few Perks depending on tier, and some pretty handy buffs.
Your supporter status is active on all supported Skynet servers and will be activated automatically on server join. Skycoins you gain are server specific and can not and will not be transferred between servers. If you are upgrading/downgrading from other subscription tier, new tier will be enabled immediately and you will loose left over days of previous subsrition. This will create recurring monthly payment you can cancel at any moment.
[F5E027]Skycoins [-] = ingame currency, everyone earns with time spent on server, and Zombie kills.
[F5E027]Skycoin Shop [-] = online shop you use Skycoins to purchase needed goodies, such as water, wood,hammers ext, or teleports for speedy travel.
[F5E027]SkyBuffs [-] = Special buffs you recieve at all times depending on Donor Tier
[F40B0B]Thank you so much for choosing our servers to spend your time on, we look forward to getting to know you!
